toast.source: GROUP-level Daily Performance Summary 'The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group'. SDLW now filled from Wed Jul 1 group summary.
toast.note: WED JUL 8 group-level Daily Performance Summary (freshest available; THU JUL 9 summary not yet delivered at Fri Jul 10 4 AM run). Net $4,599.80 / Gross $4,725.40 / 195 guests / 122 orders / $23.59 per guest, $37.70 per order / Labor 27.4% of net (~$1,260.35) / Discounts 2.7% (~$127.59) / 10 voids / $0 refunds. SDLW vs Wed Jul 1: Net $7,991.76 (down ~42%), Gross $8,400.01 (down ~44%), 300 guests, 174 orders. NOTE last Wed (Jul 1) was pre-July-4th holiday week and likely World Cup-boosted, so the drop is partly calendar/event-driven.
